name: ConanExiles
description:
This Docker will download and install SteamCMD. It will also install Conan Exiles and run it.

Servername: 'Docker ConanExiles' Password: 'Docker' rconPassword: 'adminDocker'

ATTENTION: First Startup can take very long since it downloads the gameserver files!

Update Notice: Simply restart the container if a newer version of the game is available.

You can also run multiple servers with only one SteamCMD directory!

ports.name: TCP1 - Game Port
ports.description: TCP Game Port (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new TCP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to change your server settings)

ports.name: UDP1 - Game Port
ports.description: UDP Game Port (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new UDP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to change your server settings)

ports.name: UDP2 - Game Port +1
ports.description: UDP Game Port +1 (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new UDP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to change your server settings)

ports.name: UDP3 - Steam Port
ports.description: UDP Steam Port (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new UDP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to change your server settings)

variables.name: GAME_ID
variables.description:
The GAME_ID that the container download at startup.
(https://developer.valvesoftware.com/wiki/Dedicated_Servers_List)

variables.name: GAME_PARAMS
variables.description: Enter your start up commands for the server.

variables.name: Validate Installation
variables.description: Set the Variable to 'true' if you want to validate the installation otherwise leave it blank.

variables.name: Workshop Content
variables.description: Enter you Workshopcontent here, you can also enter multiple WS Content ID's sperated by SPACE
